from dataclasses import dataclass

# Correct: isolate pure domain models from IO, parsing, and rendering concerns
@dataclass
class Invoice:
    amount: float
    
    def calculate_tax(self):
        return self.amount * 0.2

class InvoiceParser:
    @staticmethod
    def from_json(raw_data) -> Invoice:
        return Invoice(amount=raw_data["amt"])

class InvoiceRepository:
    def save(self, invoice: Invoice, connection):
        connection.execute(f"INSERT INTO invoices VALUES ({invoice.amount})")

class InvoiceView:
    @staticmethod
    def render_html(invoice: Invoice):
        return f"<h1>Invoice: {invoice.amount}</h1>"
